books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.synopsis: Treasure Island follows a young narrator who becomes entangled in a quest for buried pirate treasure. Framed by stories requested by notable gentlemen, the narrative traces how characters at the Admiral Benbow Inn connect to pirates, maps, and deadly rivalry in the search for the island’s hoard.

title.target: Dì yī zhāng: Zài Āi dé mǔ ěr Bēn bǎo
